series_metadata.series_description: a) Payroll Disbursement Journal provides evidence of each employee's pay on a bi-weekly basis via Payroll Warrants. Includes recap of all charges to agency for a prior 2 week period. B) Employee attendance record form, approved absence and overtime individual reports and weekly total time sheets are necessary for preparation of the Payroll Journal and voucher for prior 2 week period.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 5 years after audit by the State Auditor and after audit is released, then destroy, Paper: Wastepaper
